case_title: BAILEY, SYLVESTER vs. GRIFFIN, HATHAN DEWAYNE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAILEY, SYLVESTER AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, HATHAN DEWAYNE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-02-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-03-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-15-2000

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-20-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY GEORGE HOLLAND, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-05-2000 CONTINUED FROM SEP-20-2000 TO NOV-29-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-09-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY HOLLAND GEORGE. HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY HOLLAND GEORGE. HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, HATHAN DEWAYNE
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2000, OFF CALENDAR MAY 9, 2000 POS OSC OFF CALENDAR.
